description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the moul/emacs Docker image and defines a single deploy-stage job named pages to publish a site with GitLab Pages. The pages job runs only on the master branch and executes the exact shell commands: emacs --batch --eval "(progn (package-initialize) (package-refresh-contents) (package-install 'org))" and emacs --batch --no-init-file --load publish.el --funcall org-publish-all. It stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact for the Pages deployment. No services, caches, or extra variables are needed.
